source: Walkabout 13-step hero tour, recorded against the seeded showcase account (Helios analytics).

hero.caption: The full guided tour — 13 modules end to end, narration-synced moving spotlight. Homepage hero / README top / YouTube.

modules.name: home
modules.title: Home
modules.blurb: Your workspace at a glance — what needs you, and what your agents have been doing.

modules.name: chat
modules.title: AI Chat
modules.blurb: The flagship surface: streaming answers, tool calls, skills + memory, rich inline output.

modules.name: skills
modules.title: Skills
modules.blurb: Teach the agent procedures in markdown; the AI-Sparkle button rewrites them with a diff to approve.

modules.name: knowledge
modules.title: Knowledge
modules.blurb: Long-form reference the agent can search or bake into every prompt.

modules.name: inbox
modules.title: Inbox
modules.blurb: Findings the agent surfaced and actions it wants approved, in one attention surface; approvals open inline.

modules.name: projects
modules.title: Projects
modules.blurb: Group work with per-project memory, system prompt, and default model.

modules.name: routines
modules.title: Routines
modules.blurb: Recurring agents on a schedule; findings flow to the channels you pick.

modules.name: agents
modules.title: Agents
modules.blurb: Self-describing stateful agents — persona, memory, tools, and a human-in-the-loop approval queue.

modules.name: activity
modules.title: Activity
modules.blurb: The audit trail — every action on the account, with stats by type.

modules.name: connections
modules.title: Connections
modules.blurb: Per-user OAuth to external MCP servers, labelled and allow-listed per agent.

modules.name: files
modules.title: Files
modules.blurb: Upload to R2, scope to a project, preview inline — and the agent can read them.

modules.name: organizations
modules.title: Organizations
modules.blurb: Multi-tenant from day one — invite members, manage roles, switch between spaces.

modules.name: settings
modules.title: Settings
modules.blurb: Profile, preferences, theme, sessions, and a full data export.
